fields.description: The default action selected when clicking Actions on an unmatched transaction.
fields.label: Default Reconciliation Action

fields.description: The default document type when creating vouchers.
fields.label: Default Document Type

fields.description: The default Journal Entry type when creating Journal Entry vouchers.
fields.label: Default Journal Entry Type
fields.options:
Journal Entry
Inter Company Journal Entry
Bank Entry
Cash Entry
Credit Card Entry
Debit Note
Credit Note
Contra Entry
Excise Entry
Write Off Entry
Opening Entry
Depreciation Entry
Exchange Rate Revaluation
Deferred Revenue
Deferred Expense

fields.description: When enabled, the matching vouchers table in the reconciliation dialog auto-shrinks for few rows and caps at 300px when there are many. Keep disabled if your workflow involves scanning long lists of vouchers at a glance.
fields.label: Compact matching vouchers table

fields.description: When enabled, unpaid invoices in the matching dialog are listed strictly by posting date (oldest first). When disabled (default), invoices whose outstanding amount exactly matches the bank transaction are surfaced first.
fields.label: Sort unpaid invoices by posting date (FIFO)

fields.description: If checked, the unallocated amount from the bank transaction will be validated against the total of the selected unpaid invoices. If the total doesn't match, an error will be thrown.
fields.label: Validate selection against unallocated amount

fields.description: If selected, unpaid invoices are reconciled in a background job.
fields.label: Reconcile unpaid invoices in background
